ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Volumes table */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the entry */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Topics table */,
  "first_letter" TEXT /* First letter of the topic */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the entry (e.g., 'published', 'draft', or 'archived') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_volume_id FOREIGN KEY ("volume_id") REFERENCES volumes ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Topics table for hierarchical relationships */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "description_text" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "xrefs" (
  "xref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cross-reference */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that contains the cross-reference */,
  "target_entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target entry */,
  "xref_type" TEXT /* Type of cross-reference (e.g., 'see', 'see also') */,
  "xref_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cross-reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("xref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_xrefs_target_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_xrefs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that was annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_title" TEXT /* Title of the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., 'comment', 'correction', or 'question') */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher' or 'librarian') */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., 'JPEG', 'PNG', or 'TIFF') */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thumbnails" (
  "thumbnail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thumbnail */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image that the thumbnail is associated with */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail */,
  "thumbnail_format" TEXT /* Format of the thumbnail (e.g., 'JPEG', 'PNG', or 'TIFF') */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the thumbnail in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the thumbnail in pixels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thumbnail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thumbnails_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_entries" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that the index entry is associated with */,
  "index_text" TEXT /* Text of the index entry */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index entry (e.g., 'person', 'place', or 'concept') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_entries_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "also_in_entries" (
  "also_in_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 'also in' entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that the 'also in' entry is associated with */,
  "also_in_text" TEXT /* Text of the 'also in' entry */,
  "also_in_type" TEXT /* Type of 'also in' entry (e.g., 'related topic' or 'associated concept') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("also_in_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_also_in_entries_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that the location is associated with */,
  "location_text" TEXT /* Text of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., 'physical' or 'digital') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the volume */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the volume */,
  "editor" TEXT /* Editor of the volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entry_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that was revised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was made */,
  "revision_text" TEXT /* Text of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_revisions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entry_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation that was revised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision was made */,
  "revision_text" TEXT /* Text of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_revisions_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entry that the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., 'read', 'write', or 'admin') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES entries ("entry_id")
)
